* Enhanced Authorization Security Module\n *\n * Provides additional security layers for authorization including:\n * - Time-based access control\n * - Location-based access control\n * - Behavioral analysis for anomaly detection\n * - Advanced session security\n * - Resource access pattern analysis\n */\n\nimport type { Context } from \"hono\";\nimport { HTTPException } from \"hono/http-exception\";\nimport { logger } from \"../observability/logger.js\";\nimport { type AuthContext, getAuthContext } from \"./authentication.js\";\nimport { securityLogger } from \"./security-logging.js\";\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Types and Interfaces\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Time-based access control rules.\n */\nexport interface TimeBasedAccessRule {\n  /** Days of week when access is allowed (0-6, 0 = Sunday) */\n  allowedDays?: number[];\n  /** Hour range when access is allowed (0-23) */\n  allowedHours?: { start: number; end: number };\n  /** Timezone for time-based rules (default: UTC) */\n  timezone?: string;\n  /** Exceptions to the rules (specific dates when access is allowed/blocked) */\n  exceptions?: Array<{\n    date: string; // ISO date string\n    allowed: boolean;\n  }>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Location-based access control rules.\n */\nexport interface LocationAccessRule {\n  /** Allowed country codes (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) */\n  allowedCountries?: string[];\n  /** Blocked country codes */\n  blockedCountries?: string[];\n  /** Require VPN/private connection */\n  requirePrivateConnection?: boolean;\n  /** Trusted IP ranges */\n  trustedIpRanges?: Array<{ ip: string; prefixLength: number }>;\n}\n\n/**\n * Behavioral analysis result.\n */\nexport interface BehavioralAnalysis {\n  /** Risk score (0-100) */\n  riskScore: number;\n  /** Risk level */\n  riskLevel: \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n  /** Risk factors identified */\n  riskFactors: string[];\n  /** Recommended action */\n  recommendedAction: \"allow\" | \"challenge\" | \"block\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Resource access pattern for anomaly detection.\n */\nexport interface AccessPattern {\n  /** Resource type */\n  resourceType: string;\n  /** Typical access count per hour */\n  typicalAccessCount: number;\n  /** Standard deviation */\n  stdDev: number;\n  /** Last access timestamp */\n  lastAccessAt: number;\n  /** Access locations (IPs) */\n  accessLocations: Set<string>;\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Time-Based Access Control\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Check if current time allows access based on time-based rules.\n *\n * @param rules - Time-based access rules\n * @returns true if access is allowed, false otherwise\n */\nexport function checkTimeBasedAccess(rules: TimeBasedAccessRule): boolean {\n  const now = new Date();\n  const timezone = rules.timezone || \"UTC\";\n\n  // Get current time in specified timezone\n  const currentTime = new Date(now.toLocaleString(\"en-US\", { timeZone: timezone }));\n\n  const currentDay = currentTime.getDay();\n  const currentHour = currentTime.getHours();\n\n  // Check exceptions first\n  if (rules.exceptions) {\n    const currentDateStr = now.toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    const exception = rules.exceptions.find((e) => e.date === currentDateStr);\n    if (exception) {\n      return exception.allowed;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Check allowed days\n  if (rules.allowedDays && !rules.allowedDays.includes(currentDay)) {\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  // Check allowed hours\n  if (rules.allowedHours) {\n    const { start, end } = rules.allowedHours;\n    if (end < start) {\n      // Range wraps around midnight (e.g., 22:00 - 06:00)\n      if (currentHour < start && currentHour > end) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    } else {\n      // Normal range (e.g., 09:00 - 17:00)\n      if (currentHour < start || currentHour > end) {\n        return false;\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return true;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create middleware for time-based access control.\n *\n * @param rules - Time-based access rules\n */\nexport function requireTimeBasedAccess(rules: TimeBasedAccessRule) {\n  return async (c: Context, next: () => Promise<void>) => {\n    if (!checkTimeBasedAccess(rules)) {\n      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n        c,\n        \"time_based_access_denied\",\n        \"Access denied due to time-based restrictions\"\n      );\n      throw new HTTPException(403, {\n        message: \"Access is not allowed at this time\",\n      });\n    }\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Location-Based Access Control\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Extract country code from IP address (simplified).\n * In production, use a proper GeoIP database.\n *\n * @param ip - IP address\n * @returns Country code or null\n */\nfunction extractCountryFromIp(_ip: string): string | null {\n  // Simplified implementation - in production, use GeoIP database\n  // This is a placeholder that returns null (no location data)\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if IP address is in private range.\n *\n * @param ip - IP address\n * @returns true if private IP\n */\nfunction isPrivateIp(ip: string): boolean {\n  const parts = ip.split(\".\");\n  if (parts.length !== 4) return false;\n\n  const [first, second] = parts.map((p) => parseInt(p, 10));\n\n  // 10.0.0.0/8\n  if (first === 10) return true;\n\n  // 172.16.0.0/12\n  if (first === 172 && second !== undefined && second >= 16 && second <= 31) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  // 192.168.0.0/16\n  if (first === 192 && second === 168) return true;\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Check IP against trusted ranges.\n *\n * @param ip - IP address to check\n * @param trustedRanges - Trusted IP ranges\n * @returns true if IP is in trusted range\n */\nfunction isIpInTrustedRange(\n  ip: string,\n  trustedRanges: Array<{ ip: string; prefixLength: number }>\n): boolean {\n  for (const range of trustedRanges) {\n    const ipParts = ip.split(\".\").map((p) => parseInt(p, 10));\n    const rangeIpParts = range.ip.split(\".\").map((p) => parseInt(p, 10));\n\n    if (ipParts.length !== 4 || rangeIpParts.length !== 4) continue;\n\n    const octetsToCheck = Math.floor(range.prefixLength / 8);\n    let match = true;\n\n    for (let i = 0; i < octetsToCheck && i < 4; i++) {\n      if (ipParts[i] !== rangeIpParts[i]) {\n        match = false;\n        break;\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (match) return true;\n  }\n\n  return false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if location allows access based on location-based rules.\n *\n * @param clientIp - Client IP address\n * @param rules - Location-based access rules\n * @returns true if access is allowed, false otherwise\n */\nexport function checkLocationAccess(clientIp: string, rules: LocationAccessRule): boolean {\n  // Check private connection requirement\n  if (rules.requirePrivateConnection && !isPrivateIp(clientIp)) {\n    return false;\n  }\n\n  // Check trusted IP ranges\n  if (rules.trustedIpRanges && isIpInTrustedRange(clientIp, rules.trustedIpRanges)) {\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  // Check country restrictions (if GeoIP is available)\n  const country = extractCountryFromIp(clientIp);\n  if (country) {\n    if (rules.blockedCountries && rules.blockedCountries.includes(country)) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (rules.allowedCountries && !rules.allowedCountries.includes(country)) {\n      return false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  return true;\n}\n\n/**\n * Create middleware for location-based access control.\n *\n * @param rules - Location-based access rules\n */\nexport function requireLocationAccess(rules: LocationAccessRule) {\n  return async (c: Context, next: () => Promise<void>) => {\n    const clientIp =\n      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n      \"unknown\";\n\n    if (!checkLocationAccess(clientIp, rules)) {\n      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n        c,\n        \"location_based_access_denied\",\n        \"Access denied due to location restrictions\"\n      );\n      throw new HTTPException(403, {\n        message: \"Access is not allowed from this location\",\n      });\n    }\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Behavioral Analysis\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Access pattern tracking for anomaly detection.\n */\nconst accessPatterns = new Map<string, AccessPattern>();\n\n/**\n * Analyze access behavior for anomalies.\n *\n * @param auth - Authentication context\n * @param resourceType - Resource type being accessed\n * @param clientIp - Client IP address\n * @returns Behavioral analysis result\n */\nexport function analyzeAccessBehavior(\n  auth: AuthContext,\n  resourceType: string,\n  clientIp: string\n): BehavioralAnalysis {\n  const riskFactors: string[] = [];\n  let riskScore = 0;\n\n  const key = `${auth.keyId}:${resourceType}`;\n  const pattern = accessPatterns.get(key);\n\n  if (!pattern) {\n    // First access - low risk\n    return {\n      riskScore: 0,\n      riskLevel: \"low\",\n      riskFactors: [],\n      recommendedAction: \"allow\",\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Check access frequency\n  const now = Date.now();\n  const timeSinceLastAccess = now - pattern.lastAccessAt;\n  const accessCountPerHour = pattern.typicalAccessCount;\n\n  // If accessing much more frequently than normal\n  if (timeSinceLastAccess < 1000 && accessCountPerHour > 100) {\n    riskScore += 30;\n    riskFactors.push(\"Unusually high access frequency\");\n  }\n\n  // Check for new location\n  if (!pattern.accessLocations.has(clientIp)) {\n    // Accessing from a new location\n    const locationCount = pattern.accessLocations.size;\n    if (locationCount > 5) {\n      riskScore += 20;\n      riskFactors.push(\"Access from many different locations\");\n    } else {\n      riskScore += 10;\n      riskFactors.push(\"Access from new location\");\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Determine risk level and action\n  let riskLevel: \"low\" | \"medium\" | \"high\" | \"critical\";\n  let recommendedAction: \"allow\" | \"challenge\" | \"block\";\n\n  if (riskScore < 20) {\n    riskLevel = \"low\";\n    recommendedAction = \"allow\";\n  } else if (riskScore < 50) {\n    riskLevel = \"medium\";\n    recommendedAction = \"allow\";\n  } else if (riskScore < 80) {\n    riskLevel = \"high\";\n    recommendedAction = \"challenge\";\n  } else {\n    riskLevel = \"critical\";\n    recommendedAction = \"block\";\n  }\n\n  return {\n    riskScore,\n    riskLevel,\n    riskFactors,\n    recommendedAction,\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Update access pattern tracking.\n *\n * @param keyId - API key ID\n * @param resourceType - Resource type\n * @param clientIp - Client IP address\n */\nexport function updateAccessPattern(keyId: string, resourceType: string, clientIp: string): void {\n  const key = `${keyId}:${resourceType}`;\n  const pattern = accessPatterns.get(key);\n\n  if (!pattern) {\n    accessPatterns.set(key, {\n      resourceType,\n      typicalAccessCount: 1,\n      stdDev: 0,\n      lastAccessAt: Date.now(),\n      accessLocations: new Set([clientIp]),\n    });\n    return;\n  }\n\n  // Update access pattern with exponential moving average\n  const alpha = 0.1; // Smoothing factor\n  const newCount = pattern.typicalAccessCount + 1;\n  const oldMean = pattern.typicalAccessCount;\n\n  pattern.typicalAccessCount = alpha * newCount + (1 - alpha) * oldMean;\n  pattern.lastAccessAt = Date.now();\n  pattern.accessLocations.add(clientIp);\n\n  accessPatterns.set(key, pattern);\n}\n\n/**\n * Create middleware for behavioral analysis.\n *\n * @param resourceType - Resource type to analyze\n * @param options - Analysis options\n */\nexport function analyzeBehavior(\n  resourceType: string,\n  options: {\n    /** Action to take on high risk */\n    onHighRisk?: \"block\" | \"challenge\" | \"allow\";\n    /** Whether to update patterns */\n    updatePatterns?: boolean;\n  } = {}\n) {\n  const { onHighRisk = \"block\", updatePatterns = true } = options;\n\n  return async (c: Context, next: () => Promise<void>) => {\n    const auth = getAuthContext(c);\n    if (!auth) {\n      return next();\n    }\n\n    const clientIp =\n      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n      \"unknown\";\n\n    const analysis = analyzeAccessBehavior(auth, resourceType, clientIp);\n\n    if (updatePatterns) {\n      updateAccessPattern(auth.keyId, resourceType, clientIp);\n    }\n\n    // Take action based on risk level\n    if (analysis.riskLevel === \"critical\" && onHighRisk === \"block\") {\n      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n        c,\n        \"behavioral_analysis_block\",\n        `Access blocked: ${analysis.riskFactors.join(\", \")}`\n      );\n      throw new HTTPException(403, {\n        message: \"Access temporarily blocked due to suspicious activity\",\n      });\n    }\n\n    if (analysis.riskLevel === \"high\" && onHighRisk === \"challenge\") {\n      // Set a flag for additional verification\n      c.set(\"requireAdditionalVerification\", true);\n      logger.info(\"High-risk access detected - additional verification recommended\", {\n        keyId: auth.keyId,\n        resourceType,\n        riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n      });\n    }\n\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Session Security Enhancements\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Session security configuration.\n */\nexport interface SessionSecurityConfig {\n  /** Maximum concurrent sessions per user */\n  maxConcurrentSessions?: number;\n  /** Whether to enforce IP binding */\n  enforceIpBinding?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enforce device binding */\n  enforceDeviceBinding?: boolean;\n  /** Session inactivity timeout in milliseconds */\n  inactivityTimeout?: number;\n  /** Whether to check for concurrent sessions from different locations */\n  checkConcurrentLocations?: boolean;\n}\n\n/**\n * Default session security configuration.\n */\nconst DEFAULT_SESSION_SECURITY: SessionSecurityConfig = {\n  maxConcurrentSessions: 5,\n  enforceIpBinding: true,\n  enforceDeviceBinding: false,\n  inactivityTimeout: 30 * 60 * 1000, // 30 minutes\n  checkConcurrentLocations: true,\n};\n\n/**\n * Enhanced session security check.\n *\n * Performs comprehensive session security validation.\n *\n * @param auth - Authentication context\n * @param clientIp - Client IP address\n * @param userAgent - User agent string\n * @param config - Security configuration\n * @returns Object indicating if session is secure and any issues found\n */\nexport function checkSessionSecurity(\n  auth: AuthContext,\n  clientIp: string,\n  userAgent: string | undefined,\n  config: SessionSecurityConfig = {}\n): { secure: boolean; issues: string[]; recommendations: string[] } {\n  const mergedConfig = { ...DEFAULT_SESSION_SECURITY, ...config };\n  const issues: string[] = [];\n  const recommendations: string[] = [];\n\n  // Check if session exists\n  if (!auth.sessionId) {\n    return {\n      secure: false,\n      issues: [\"No active session\"],\n      recommendations: [\"Authenticate to establish a session\"],\n    };\n  }\n\n  // Note: These checks would be integrated with the actual session storage\n  // This is a framework for the security checks\n\n  if (mergedConfig.enforceIpBinding) {\n    // IP binding would be checked against stored session IP\n    recommendations.push(\"IP binding is enforced for this session\");\n  }\n\n  if (mergedConfig.enforceDeviceBinding) {\n    // Device binding would be checked against stored device fingerprint\n    recommendations.push(\"Device binding is enforced for this session\");\n  }\n\n  return {\n    secure: issues.length === 0,\n    issues,\n    recommendations,\n  };\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Utility Functions\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Clear access pattern tracking for a key.\n *\n * @param keyId - API key ID\n */\nexport function clearAccessPatterns(keyId?: string): void {\n  if (keyId) {\n    for (const [key] of accessPatterns.entries()) {\n      if (key.startsWith(`${keyId}:`)) {\n        accessPatterns.delete(key);\n      }\n    }\n  } else {\n    accessPatterns.clear();\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Get access pattern statistics.\n *\n * @returns Statistics about tracked access patterns\n */\nexport function getAccessPatternStats(): {\n  totalPatterns: number;\n  patternsByResourceType: Record<string, number>;\n  averageAccessCount: number;\n} {\n  let totalAccessCount = 0;\n  const patternsByResourceType: Record<string, number> = {};\n\n  for (const pattern of accessPatterns.values()) {\n    totalAccessCount += pattern.typicalAccessCount;\n    patternsByResourceType[pattern.resourceType] =\n      (patternsByResourceType[pattern.resourceType] || 0) + 1;\n  }\n\n  return {\n    totalPatterns: accessPatterns.size,\n    patternsByResourceType,\n    averageAccessCount: accessPatterns.size > 0 ? totalAccessCount / accessPatterns.size : 0,\n  };\n}\n","numLines":603,"startLine":1,"totalLines":603}}}

\"warning\" | \"error\" | \"critical\";\n140\t  /** Event message */\n141\t  message: string;\n142\t  /** Additional details */\n143\t  details?: Record<string, unknown>;\n144\t}\n145\t\n146\t// ============================================================================\n149\t\n150\tconst DEFAULT_CONFIG: Required<\n151\t  Omit<EnhancedAuthConfig, \"jwtSecret\" | \"timeBasedRules\" | \"locationRules\" | \"sessionConfig\">\n152\t> &\n153\t  Pick<EnhancedAuthConfig, \"timeBasedRules\" | \"locationRules\" | \"sessionConfig\"> = {\n154\t  enableJwtValidation: true,\n155\t  enableEnhancedJwt: true,\n156\t  enableConcurrentSessions: true,\n157\t  enableRbacCache: true,\n158\t  enableAuditLogging: true,\n159\t  enableTimeBasedAccess: false,\n160\t  enableLocationAccess: false,\n161\t  enableBehavioralAnalysis: true,\n162\t  timeBasedRules: undefined,\n163\t  locationRules: undefined,\n164\t  sessionConfig: {\n165\t    maxConcurrentSessions: 5,\n166\t    maxSessionsPerDevice: 2,\n167\t    conflictResolution: \"terminate_oldest\",\n168\t    sessionTimeout: 30 * 60 * 1000,\n169\t    maxIdleTime: 60 * 60 * 1000,\n170\t  },\n171\t  riskThreshold: 70,\n172\t  requireMfaForHighRisk: true,\n173\t  onTokenCompromised: \"revoke\",\n174\t  onSessionLimitExceeded: \"terminate_oldest\",\n175\t};\n176\t\n177\t// ============================================================================\n178\t// Middleware Factory Functions\n179\t// ============================================================================\n180\t\n181\t/**\n182\t * Create enhanced authentication middleware with all security features.\n183\t *\n184\t * This middleware provides comprehensive authentication by integrating:\n185\t * - JWT validation\n186\t * - Token compromise detection\n187\t * - Session management\n188\t * - Permission checking\n189\t * - Audit logging\n190\t * - Time/location-based access control\n191\t * - Behavioral analysis\n192\t *\n193\t * @param config - Enhanced authentication configuration\n194\t * @returns Hono middleware handler\n195\t */\n196\texport function createEnhancedAuth(config: EnhancedAuthConfig = {}): MiddlewareHandler {\n197\t  const mergedConfig = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...config };\n198\t\n199\t  return async (c, next) => {\n200\t    const startTime = Date.now();\n201\t    const securityEvents: AuthSecurityEvent[] = [];\n202\t\n203\t    // Get client information\n204\t    const clientIp =\n205\t      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n206\t      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n207\t      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n208\t      \"unknown\";\n209\t    const userAgent = c.req.header(\"User-Agent\");\n210\t\n211\t    // Get standard auth context\n212\t    const auth = getAuthContext(c);\n213\t    if (!auth) {\n214\t      securityEvents.push({\n215\t        type: \"auth_missing\",\n216\t        timestamp: startTime,\n217\t        severity: \"warning\",\n218\t        message: \"Authentication required\",\n219\t      });\n220\t      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });\n221\t    }\n222\t\n223\t    // Initialize enhanced auth result\n224\t    const enhancedResult: EnhancedAuthResult = {\n225\t      auth,\n226\t      securityIncidents: [],\n227\t    };\n228\t\n229\t    // 1. Time-based access control\n230\t    if (mergedConfig.enableTimeBasedAccess && mergedConfig.timeBasedRules) {\n231\t      if (!checkTimeBasedAccess(mergedConfig.timeBasedRules)) {\n232\t        securityEvents.push({\n233\t          type: \"time_based_access_denied\",\n234\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n235\t          severity: \"warning\",\n236\t          message: \"Access denied due to time-based restrictions\",\n237\t        });\n238\t        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"time_based_access_denied\", \"warning\");\n239\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n240\t          message: \"Access is not allowed at this time\",\n241\t        });\n242\t      }\n243\t    }\n244\t\n245\t    // 2. Location-based access control\n246\t    if (mergedConfig.enableLocationAccess && mergedConfig.locationRules) {\n247\t      if (!checkLocationAccess(clientIp, mergedConfig.locationRules)) {\n248\t        securityEvents.push({\n249\t          type: \"location_based_access_denied\",\n250\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n251\t          severity: \"warning\",\n252\t          message: \"Access denied due to location restrictions\",\n253\t        });\n254\t        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"location_based_access_denied\", \"warning\");\n255\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n256\t          message: \"Access is not allowed from this location\",\n257\t        });\n258\t      }\n259\t    }\n260\t\n261\t    // 3. Session risk assessment\n262\t    const session = c.get(\"session\") as AuthSession | undefined;\n263\t    if (session && auth.sessionId) {\n264\t      const riskAssessment = await assessSessionRisk(session, clientIp, userAgent);\n265\t      enhancedResult.riskAssessment = riskAssessment;\n266\t\n267\t      if (riskAssessment.riskScore >= (mergedConfig.riskThreshold || 70)) {\n268\t        securityEvents.push({\n269\t          type: \"high_risk_session\",\n270\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n271\t          severity: \"error\",\n272\t          message: `High-risk session detected (score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore})`,\n273\t          details: { riskFactors: riskAssessment.riskFactors },\n274\t        });\n275\t\n276\t        if (mergedConfig.requireMfaForHighRisk && !auth.mfaVerified) {\n277\t          await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"mfa_required_high_risk\", \"warning\");\n278\t          enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification = true;\n279\t        }\n280\t      }\n281\t\n282\t      // Record security event for risk tracking\n283\t      recordSecurityEvent(auth.sessionId, {\n284\t        type: \"session_risk_assessed\",\n285\t        timestamp: Date.now(),\n286\t        score: riskAssessment.riskScore,\n287\t        details: { riskLevel: riskAssessment.riskLevel },\n288\t      });\n289\t    }\n290\t\n291\t    // 4. Enhanced JWT security (if using JWT tokens)\n292\t    if (mergedConfig.enableEnhancedJwt) {\n293\t      const jwtToken = extractJwtFromRequest(c);\n294\t      if (jwtToken) {\n295\t        const deviceFp = generateDeviceFingerprint(userAgent, clientIp);\n296\t        const compromiseDetection = detectTokenCompromise(jwtToken, {\n297\t          clientIp,\n298\t          userAgent,\n299\t          requestPath: c.req.path,\n300\t        });\n301\t\n302\t        enhancedResult.compromiseDetection = compromiseDetection;\n303\t\n304\t        if (compromiseDetection.compromised) {\n305\t          securityEvents.push({\n306\t            type: \"token_compromised\",\n307\t            timestamp: Date.now(),\n308\t            severity: \"critical\",\n309\t            message: \"Token compromise detected\",\n310\t            details: {\n311\t              riskScore: compromiseDetection.riskScore,\n312\t              riskFactors: compromiseDetection.riskFactors,\n313\t            },\n314\t          });\n315\t\n316\t          // Log token usage for pattern analysis\n317\t          recordTokenUsage(jwtToken, {\n318\t            usedAt: Date.now(),\n319\t            clientIp,\n320\t            userAgent,\n321\t            requestPath: c.req.path,\n322\t            suspicious: true,\n323\t            suspicionReason: compromiseDetection.riskFactors.join(\", \"),\n324\t          });\n325\t\n326\t          if (mergedConfig.onTokenCompromised === \"block\") {\n327\t            await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"token_compromised_blocked\", \"critical\");\n328\t            throw new HTTPException(403, {\n329\t              message: \"Token has been compromised. Please re-authenticate.\",\n330\t            });\n331\t          } else if (mergedConfig.onTokenCompromised === \"revoke\") {\n332\t            // Invalidate the session/token\n333\t            if (auth.sessionId) {\n334\t              // Session would be invalidated here\n335\t              await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"token_revoked_compromised\", \"critical\");\n336\t            }\n337\t          }\n338\t        } else {\n339\t          // Record normal token usage\n340\t          recordTokenUsage(jwtToken, {\n341\t            usedAt: Date.now(),\n342\t            clientIp,\n343\t            userAgent,\n344\t            requestPath: c.req.path,\n345\t            suspicious: false,\n346\t          });\n347\t        }\n348\t      }\n349\t    }\n350\t\n351\t    // 5. Behavioral analysis\n352\t    if (mergedConfig.enableBehavioralAnalysis) {\n353\t      const analysis = analyzeAccessBehavior(auth, c.req.path, clientIp);\n354\t      updateAccessPattern(auth.keyId, c.req.path, clientIp);\n355\t\n356\t      if (analysis.recommendedAction === \"block\") {\n357\t        securityEvents.push({\n358\t          type: \"behavioral_analysis_block\",\n359\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n360\t          severity: \"error\",\n361\t          message: \"Access blocked due to suspicious behavior\",\n362\t          details: {\n363\t            riskScore: analysis.riskScore,\n364\t            riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n365\t          },\n366\t        });\n367\t        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"behavioral_block\", \"error\");\n368\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n369\t          message: \"Access temporarily blocked due to suspicious activity\",\n370\t        });\n371\t      } else if (analysis.recommendedAction === \"challenge\" && analysis.riskScore > 40) {\n372\t        enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification = true;\n373\t        securityEvents.push({\n374\t          type: \"behavioral_challenge\",\n375\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n376\t          severity: \"warning\",\n377\t          message: \"Additional verification recommended\",\n378\t          details: {\n379\t            riskScore: analysis.riskScore,\n380\t            riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n381\t          },\n382\t        });\n383\t      }\n384\t    }\n385\t\n386\t    // 6. Concurrent session management\n387\t    if (mergedConfig.enableConcurrentSessions && session && auth.sessionId) {\n388\t      const deviceInfo: SessionDeviceInfo = {\n389\t        deviceId: deviceFingerprintFromUa(userAgent),\n390\t        deviceType: getDeviceTypeFromUa(userAgent),\n391\t        trusted: false, // Would be determined from stored device trust\n392\t      };\n393\t\n394\t      const conflictResult = registerSession(session, { deviceInfo }, mergedConfig.sessionConfig);\n395\t      enhancedResult.sessionConflict = conflictResult;\n396\t\n397\t      if (!conflictResult.allowed) {\n398\t        securityEvents.push({\n399\t          type: \"session_limit_exceeded\",\n400\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n401\t          severity: \"warning\",\n402\t          message: \"Session limit exceeded\",\n403\t          details: {\n404\t            terminatedSessions: conflictResult.terminatedSessions,\n405\t            reason: conflictResult.reason,\n406\t          },\n407\t        });\n408\t        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"session_limit_exceeded\", \"warning\");\n409\t        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n410\t          message: conflictResult.reason || \"Maximum concurrent sessions exceeded\",\n411\t        });\n412\t      }\n413\t\n414\t      // Update session activity\n415\t      updateSessionActivity(auth.sessionId);\n416\t\n417\t      if (conflictResult.terminatedSessions.length > 0) {\n418\t        securityEvents.push({\n419\t          type: \"session_terminated\",\n420\t          timestamp: Date.now(),\n421\t          severity: \"info\",\n422\t          message: \"Previous session terminated due to limit\",\n423\t          details: {\n424\t            terminatedSessions: conflictResult.terminatedSessions,\n425\t          },\n426\t        });\n427\t      }\n428\t    }\n429\t\n430\t    // 7. Check for security incidents\n431\t    const incidents = detectSecurityIncidents();\n432\t    if (incidents.length > 0) {\n433\t      enhancedResult.securityIncidents = incidents.map((i) => i.type);\n434\t      securityEvents.push({\n435\t        type: \"security_incidents_detected\",\n436\t        timestamp: Date.now(),\n437\t        severity: \"warning\",\n438\t        message: `${incidents.length} security incidents detected`,\n439\t        details: { incidents },\n440\t      });\n441\t    }\n442\t\n443\t    // 8. Structured audit logging\n444\t    if (mergedConfig.enableAuditLogging) {\n445\t      const outcome: AuditOutcome = enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification\n446\t        ? \"partial\"\n447\t        : \"success\";\n448\t      const severity: AuditSeverity =\n449\t        enhancedResult.securityIncidents && enhancedResult.securityIncidents.length > 0\n450\t          ? \"warning\"\n451\t          : \"info\";\n452\t\n453\t      logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n454\t        category: \"authentication\",\n455\t        severity,\n456\t        outcome,\n457\t        action: \"enhanced_auth\",\n458\t        details: {\n459\t          riskScore: enhancedResult.riskAssessment?.riskScore,\n460\t          compromiseDetected: enhancedResult.compromiseDetection?.compromised,\n461\t          sessionConflicts: enhancedResult.sessionConflict?.terminatedSessions.length,\n462\t          requiresVerification: enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification,\n463\t          securityEvents,\n464\t        },\n465\t      });\n466\t    }\n467\t\n468\t    // Attach enhanced result to context\n469\t    c.set(\"enhancedAuth\", enhancedResult);\n470\t\n471\t    const duration = Date.now() - startTime;\n472\t    logger.debug(\"Enhanced authentication completed\", {\n473\t      keyId: auth.keyId,\n474\t      duration,\n475\t      securityEvents: securityEvents.length,\n476\t      riskScore: enhancedResult.riskAssessment?.riskScore,\n477\t    });\n478\t\n479\t    return next();\n480\t  };\n481\t}\n482\t\n483\t/**\n484\t * Require specific permissions with enhanced checking.\n485\t *\n486\t * Checks permissions using dynamic RBAC cache and logs results.\n487\t *\n488\t * @param permissions - Array of permissions to check\n489\t * @param options - Check options\n490\t * @returns Hono middleware handler\n491\t */\n492\texport function requirePermissions(\n493\t  permissions: string[],\n494\t  options: {\n495\t    /** Require all permissions (true) or any permission (false) */\n496\t    requireAll?: boolean;\n497\t    /** Resource ID for resource-specific permissions */\n498\t    resourceId?: string;\n499\t    /** Enhanced auth config */\n500\t    config?: EnhancedAuthConfig;\n501\t  } = {}\n502\t): MiddlewareHandler {\n503\t  const { requireAll = true, resourceId, config } = options;\n504\t\n505\t  return async (c, next) => {\n506\t    const auth = getAuthContext(c);\n507\t    if (!auth) {\n508\t      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });\n509\t    }\n510\t\n511\t    const mergedConfig = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...config };\n512\t    const permissionResults = new Map<string, PermissionCheckResult>();\n513\t\n514\t    // Check permissions\n515\t    for (const permission of permissions) {\n516\t      const result = checkPermission(auth.role || \"guest\", permission as any, {\n517\t        resourceId,\n518\t        userId: auth.keyId,\n519\t        config: mergedConfig.sessionConfig,\n520\t      });\n521\t      permissionResults.set(permission, result);\n522\t    }\n523\t\n524\t    // Determine if access is granted\n525\t    let granted: boolean;\n526\t    if (requireAll) {\n527\t      granted = Array.from(permissionResults.values()).every((r) => r.granted);\n528\t    } else {\n529\t      granted = Array.from(permissionResults.values()).some((r) => r.granted);\n530\t    }\n531\t\n532\t    if (!granted) {\n533\t      // Log authorization failure\n534\t      const deniedPermissions = Array.from(permissionResults.entries())\n535\t        .filter(([, r]) => !r.granted)\n536\t        .map(([p, r]) => `${p}: ${r.reason}`);\n537\t\n538\t      securityLogger.logAuthzFailure(c, \"permission\", \"enhanced\");\n539\t\n540\t      if (mergedConfig.enableAuditLogging) {\n541\t        logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n542\t          category: \"authorization\",\n543\t          severity: \"warning\",\n544\t          outcome: \"failure\",\n545\t          action: \"permission_check\",\n546\t          details: {\n547\t            permissions,\n548\t            requireAll,\n549\t            deniedPermissions,\n550\t          },\n551\t        });\n552\t      }\n553\t\n554\t      throw new HTTPException(403, {\n555\t        message: \"Insufficient permissions\",\n556\t      });\n557\t    }\n558\t\n559\t    // Attach permission results to context\n560\t    const enhancedResult = c.get(\"enhancedAuth\") as EnhancedAuthResult | undefined;\n561\t    if (enhancedResult) {\n562\t      enhancedResult.permissionResults = permissionResults;\n563\t    }\n564\t\n565\t    // Log authorization success\n566\t    if (mergedConfig.enableAuditLogging) {\n567\t      logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n568\t        category: \"authorization\",\n569\t        severity: \"info\",\n570\t        outcome: \"success\",\n571\t        action: \"permission_check\",\n572\t        details: {\n573\t          permissions,\n574\t          requireAll,\n575\t        },\n576\t      });\n577\t    }\n578\t\n579\t    return next();\n580\t  };\n581\t}\n582\t\n583\t// ============================================================================\n584\t// Helper Functions\n585\t// ============================================================================\n586\t\n587\t/**\n588\t * Extract JWT token from request.\n589\t */\n590\tfunction extractJwtFromRequest(c: Context): string | null {\n591\t  const authHeader = c.req.header(\"Authorization\");\n592\t  if (authHeader?.startsWith(\"Bearer \")) {\n593\t    return authHeader.substring(7);\n594\t  }\n595\t\n596\t  const cookieHeader = c.req.header(\"Cookie\");\n597\t  if (cookieHeader) {\n598\t    const cookies = cookieHeader.split(\";\").map((c) => c.trim());\n599\t    for (const cookie of cookies) {\n600\t      if (cookie.startsWith(\"jwt=\") || cookie.startsWith(\"token=\")) {\n601\t        return cookie.substring(4);\n602\t      }\n603\t    }\n604\t  }\n605\t\n606\t  return null;\n607\t}\n608\t\n609\t/**\n610\t * Generate device fingerprint from user agent.\n611\t */\n612\tfunction deviceFingerprintFromUa(userAgent: string | undefined): string {\n613\t  if (!userAgent) return \"unknown\";\n614\t\n615\t  // Simple hash of user agent for device identification\n616\t  let hash = 0;\n617\t  for (let i = 0; i < userAgent.length; i++) {\n618\t    const char = userAgent.charCodeAt(i);\n619\t    hash = (hash << 5) - hash + char;\n620\t    hash = hash & hash;\n621\t  }\n622\t\n623\t  return Math.abs(hash).toString(16);\n624\t}\n625\t\n626\t/**\n627\t * Get device type from user agent.\n628\t */\n629\tfunction getDeviceTypeFromUa(\n630\t  userAgent: string | undefined\n631\t): \"mobile\" | \"tablet\" | \"desktop\" | \"unknown\" {\n632\t  if (!userAgent) return \"unknown\";\n633\t\n634\t  const ua = userAgent.toLowerCase();\n635\t\n636\t  if (/mobile|android|iphone|ipod|blackberry|iemobile|opera mini/i.test(ua)) {\n637\t    return \"mobile\";\n638\t  } else if (/tablet|ipad|playbook|silk/i.test(ua)) {\n639\t    return \"tablet\";\n640\t  } else if (ua.length > 0) {\n641\t    return \"desktop\";\n642\t  }\n643\t\n644\t  return \"unknown\";\n645\t}\n646\t\n647\t/**\n648\t * Log security event to audit log.\n649\t */\n650\tasync function logSecurityEvent(\n651\t  c: Context,\n652\t  auth: AuthContext,\n653\t  eventType: string,\n654\t  severity: \"info\" | \"warning\" | \"error\" | \"critical\"\n655\t): Promise<void> {\n656\t  logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n657\t    category: \"security\",\n658\t    severity,\n659\t    outcome: severity === \"error\" || severity === \"critical\" ? \"failure\" : \"success\",\n660\t    action: eventType,\n661\t    details: {\n662\t      keyId: auth.keyId,\n663\t      sessionId: auth.sessionId,\n664\t      scope: auth.scope,\n665\t      role: auth.role,\n666\t    },\n667\t  });\n668\t}\n669\t\n670\t/**\n671\t * Get enhanced auth result from context.\n672\t */\n673\texport function getEnhancedAuth(c: Context): EnhancedAuthResult | undefined {\n674\t  return c.get(\"enhancedAuth\");\n675\t}\n676\t\n677\t/**\n678\t * Check if additional verification is required.\n679\t */\n680\texport function requiresAdditionalVerification(c: Context): boolean {\n681\t  const enhancedAuth = getEnhancedAuth(c);\n682\t  return enhancedAuth?.requiresAdditionalVerification ?? false;\n683\t}\n684\t\n685\t/**\n686\t * Get security incidents for current request.\n687\t */\n688\texport function getSecurityIncidents(c: Context): string[] {\n689\t  const enhancedAuth = getEnhancedAuth(c);\n690\t  return enhancedAuth?.securityIncidents || [];\n691\t}\n692\t\n693\t// ============================================================================\n694\t// Utility Functions\n695\t// ============================================================================\n696\t\n697\t/**\n698\t * Invalidate all cached data for a user.\n699\t * Call this when permissions, roles, or sessions change.\n700\t *\n701\t * @param keyId - API key ID\n702\t */\n703\texport function invalidateUserAuthData(keyId: string): void {\n704\t  invalidateUserCache(keyId);\n705\t  logger.info(\"User auth data invalidated\", { keyId });\n706\t}\n707\t\n708\t/**\n709\t * Get comprehensive security status for a user.\n710\t *\n711\t * @param keyId - API key ID\n712\t * @returns Security status information\n713\t */\n714\texport function getUserSecurityStatus(keyId: string): {\n715\t  sessionCount: number;\n716\t  activeIncidents: number;\n717\t  riskFactors: string[];\n718\t} {\n719\t  // This would query the various security modules\n720\t  // For now, return a placeholder\n721\t  return {\n722\t    sessionCount: getUserSessionCount(keyId),\n723\t    activeIncidents: detectSecurityIncidents().filter((i) =>\n724\t      i.events.some((e) => e.actor.keyId === keyId)\n725\t    ).length,\n726\t    riskFactors: [],\n727\t  };\n728\t}\n729\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c93cc6db-9604-447b-bedb-ccf0fc966d30","uuid":"bac9b754-43d4-4e68-b12a-c521686a6f13","timestamp":"2026-05-09T04:06:06.390Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/mta-my-way/packages/server/src/middleware/enhanced-authentication.ts","content":"/**\n system that provides defense in depth.\n */\n\nimport type { Context, MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\nimport { HTTPException } from \"hono/http-exception\";\nimport { logger } from ============================================================================\n// Types and Interfaces\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Enhanced authentication configuration.\n */\nexport interface EnhancedAuthConfig {\n  /** JWT secret for token validation */\n  jwtSecret?: string;\n  /** Whether to enable JWT validation */\n  enableJwtValidation?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable enhanced JWT security (compromise detection) */\n  enableEnhancedJwt?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable concurrent session management */\n  enableConcurrentSessions?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable dynamic RBAC caching */\n  enableRbacCache?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable structured audit logging */\n  enableAuditLogging?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable time-based access control */\n  enableTimeBasedAccess?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable location-based access control */\n  enableLocationAccess?: boolean;\n  /** Whether to enable behavioral analysis */\n  enableBehavioralAnalysis?: boolean;\n  /** Time-based access rules */\n  timeBasedRules?: TimeBasedAccessRule;\n  /** Location-based access rules */\n  locationRules?: LocationAccessRule;\n  /** Concurrent session configuration */\n  sessionConfig?: ConcurrentSessionConfig;\n  /** Risk threshold for blocking authentication (0-100) */\n  riskThreshold?: number;\n  /** Whether to require MFA for high-risk sessions */\n  requireMfaForHighRisk?: boolean;\n  /** Action to take on compromised tokens */\n  onTokenCompromised?: \"block\" | \"revoke\" | \"allow\";\n  /** Action to take on session limit exceeded */\n  onSessionLimitExceeded?: \"deny\" | \"terminate_oldest\" | \"allow_all\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Enhanced authentication result attached to context.\n */\nexport interface EnhancedAuthResult {\n  /** Standard authentication context */\n  auth: AuthContext;\n  /** Session risk assessment (if available) */\n  riskAssessment?: SessionRiskAssessment;\n  /** Token compromise detection result (if available) */\n  compromiseDetection?: CompromiseDetectionResult;\n  /** Session conflict result (if applicable) */\n  sessionConflict?: SessionConflictResult;\n  /** Permission check results (if permissions checked) */\n  permissionResults?: Map<string, PermissionCheckResult>;\n  /** Whether additional verification is required */\n  requiresAdditionalVerification?: boolean;\n  /** Security incidents detected */\n  securityIncidents?: string[];\n}\n\n/**\n * Security event for enhanced authentication tracking.\n */\nexport interface AuthSecurityEvent {\n  /** Event type */\n  type: string;\n  /** Event timestamp */\n  timestamp: number;\n  /** Event severity */\n  severity: \"info\" | \"warning\" | \"error\" | \"critical\";\n  /** Event message */\n  message: string;\n  /** Additional details */\n  details?: Record<string, unknown>;\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Default Configuration\n// ============================================================================\n\nconst DEFAULT_CONFIG: Required<\n  Omit<EnhancedAuthConfig, \"jwtSecret\" | \"timeBasedRules\" | \"locationRules\" | \"sessionConfig\">\n> &\n  Pick<EnhancedAuthConfig, \"timeBasedRules\" | \"locationRules\" | \"sessionConfig\"> = {\n  enableJwtValidation: true,\n  enableEnhancedJwt: true,\n  enableConcurrentSessions: true,\n  enableRbacCache: true,\n  enableAuditLogging: true,\n  enableTimeBasedAccess: false,\n  enableLocationAccess: false,\n  enableBehavioralAnalysis: true,\n  timeBasedRules: undefined,\n  locationRules: undefined,\n  sessionConfig: {\n    maxConcurrentSessions: 5,\n    maxSessionsPerDevice: 2,\n    conflictResolution: \"terminate_oldest\",\n    sessionTimeout: 30 * 60 * 1000,\n    maxIdleTime: 60 * 60 * 1000,\n  },\n  riskThreshold: 70,\n  requireMfaForHighRisk: true,\n  onTokenCompromised: \"revoke\",\n  onSessionLimitExceeded: \"terminate_oldest\",\n};\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Middleware Factory Functions\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Create enhanced authentication middleware with all security features.\n *\n * This middleware provides comprehensive authentication by integrating:\n * - JWT validation\n * - Token compromise detection\n * - Session management\n * - Permission checking\n * - Audit logging\n * - Time/location-based access control\n * - Behavioral analysis\n *\n * @param config - Enhanced authentication configuration\n * @returns Hono middleware handler\n */\nexport function createEnhancedAuth(config: EnhancedAuthConfig = {}): MiddlewareHandler {\n  const mergedConfig = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...config };\n\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    const startTime = Date.now();\n    const securityEvents: AuthSecurityEvent[] = [];\n\n    // Get client information\n    const clientIp =\n      c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n      c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n      \"unknown\";\n    const userAgent = c.req.header(\"User-Agent\");\n\n    // Get standard auth context\n    const auth = getAuthContext(c);\n    if (!auth) {\n      securityEvents.push({\n        type: \"auth_missing\",\n        timestamp: startTime,\n        severity: \"warning\",\n        message: \"Authentication required\",\n      });\n      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });\n    }\n\n    // Initialize enhanced auth result\n    const enhancedResult: EnhancedAuthResult = {\n      auth,\n      securityIncidents: [],\n    };\n\n    // 1. Time-based access control\n    if (mergedConfig.enableTimeBasedAccess && mergedConfig.timeBasedRules) {\n      if (!checkTimeBasedAccess(mergedConfig.timeBasedRules)) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"time_based_access_denied\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          message: \"Access denied due to time-based restrictions\",\n        });\n        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"time_based_access_denied\", \"warning\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: \"Access is not allowed at this time\",\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 2. Location-based access control\n    if (mergedConfig.enableLocationAccess && mergedConfig.locationRules) {\n      if (!checkLocationAccess(clientIp, mergedConfig.locationRules)) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"location_based_access_denied\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          message: \"Access denied due to location restrictions\",\n        });\n        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"location_based_access_denied\", \"warning\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: \"Access is not allowed from this location\",\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 3. Session risk assessment\n    const session = c.get(\"session\") as AuthSession | undefined;\n    if (session && auth.sessionId) {\n      const riskAssessment = await assessSessionRisk(session, clientIp, userAgent);\n      enhancedResult.riskAssessment = riskAssessment;\n\n      if (riskAssessment.riskScore >= (mergedConfig.riskThreshold || 70)) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"high_risk_session\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"error\",\n          message: `High-risk session detected (score: ${riskAssessment.riskScore})`,\n          details: { riskFactors: riskAssessment.riskFactors },\n        });\n\n        if (mergedConfig.requireMfaForHighRisk && !auth.mfaVerified) {\n          await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"mfa_required_high_risk\", \"warning\");\n          enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification = true;\n        }\n      }\n\n      // Record security event for risk tracking\n      recordSecurityEvent(auth.sessionId, {\n        type: \"session_risk_assessed\",\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n        score: riskAssessment.riskScore,\n        details: { riskLevel: riskAssessment.riskLevel },\n      });\n    }\n\n    // 4. Enhanced JWT security (if using JWT tokens)\n    if (mergedConfig.enableEnhancedJwt) {\n      const jwtToken = extractJwtFromRequest(c);\n      if (jwtToken) {\n        const deviceFp = generateDeviceFingerprint(userAgent, clientIp);\n        const compromiseDetection = detectTokenCompromise(jwtToken, {\n          clientIp,\n          userAgent,\n          requestPath: c.req.path,\n        });\n\n        enhancedResult.compromiseDetection = compromiseDetection;\n\n        if (compromiseDetection.compromised) {\n          securityEvents.push({\n            type: \"token_compromised\",\n            timestamp: Date.now(),\n            severity: \"critical\",\n            message: \"Token compromise detected\",\n            details: {\n              riskScore: compromiseDetection.riskScore,\n              riskFactors: compromiseDetection.riskFactors,\n            },\n          });\n\n          // Log token usage for pattern analysis\n          recordTokenUsage(jwtToken, {\n            usedAt: Date.now(),\n            clientIp,\n            userAgent,\n            requestPath: c.req.path,\n            suspicious: true,\n            suspicionReason: compromiseDetection.riskFactors.join(\", \"),\n          });\n\n          if (mergedConfig.onTokenCompromised === \"block\") {\n            await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"token_compromised_blocked\", \"critical\");\n            throw new HTTPException(403, {\n              message: \"Token has been compromised. Please re-authenticate.\",\n            });\n          } else if (mergedConfig.onTokenCompromised === \"revoke\") {\n            // Invalidate the session/token\n            if (auth.sessionId) {\n              // Session would be invalidated here\n              await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"token_revoked_compromised\", \"critical\");\n            }\n          }\n        } else {\n          // Record normal token usage\n          recordTokenUsage(jwtToken, {\n            usedAt: Date.now(),\n            clientIp,\n            userAgent,\n            requestPath: c.req.path,\n            suspicious: false,\n          });\n        }\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 5. Behavioral analysis\n    if (mergedConfig.enableBehavioralAnalysis) {\n      const analysis = analyzeAccessBehavior(auth, c.req.path, clientIp);\n      updateAccessPattern(auth.keyId, c.req.path, clientIp);\n\n      if (analysis.recommendedAction === \"block\") {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"behavioral_analysis_block\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"error\",\n          message: \"Access blocked due to suspicious behavior\",\n          details: {\n            riskScore: analysis.riskScore,\n            riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n          },\n        });\n        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"behavioral_block\", \"error\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: \"Access temporarily blocked due to suspicious activity\",\n        });\n      } else if (analysis.recommendedAction === \"challenge\" && analysis.riskScore > 40) {\n        enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification = true;\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"behavioral_challenge\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          message: \"Additional verification recommended\",\n          details: {\n            riskScore: analysis.riskScore,\n            riskFactors: analysis.riskFactors,\n          },\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 6. Concurrent session management\n    if (mergedConfig.enableConcurrentSessions && session && auth.sessionId) {\n      const deviceInfo: SessionDeviceInfo = {\n        deviceId: deviceFingerprintFromUa(userAgent),\n        deviceType: getDeviceTypeFromUa(userAgent),\n        trusted: false, // Would be determined from stored device trust\n      };\n\n      const conflictResult = registerSession(session, { deviceInfo }, mergedConfig.sessionConfig);\n      enhancedResult.sessionConflict = conflictResult;\n\n      if (!conflictResult.allowed) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"session_limit_exceeded\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          message: \"Session limit exceeded\",\n          details: {\n            terminatedSessions: conflictResult.terminatedSessions,\n            reason: conflictResult.reason,\n          },\n        });\n        await logSecurityEvent(c, auth, \"session_limit_exceeded\", \"warning\");\n        throw new HTTPException(403, {\n          message: conflictResult.reason || \"Maximum concurrent sessions exceeded\",\n        });\n      }\n\n      // Update session activity\n      updateSessionActivity(auth.sessionId);\n\n      if (conflictResult.terminatedSessions.length > 0) {\n        securityEvents.push({\n          type: \"session_terminated\",\n          timestamp: Date.now(),\n          severity: \"info\",\n          message: \"Previous session terminated due to limit\",\n          details: {\n            terminatedSessions: conflictResult.terminatedSessions,\n          },\n        });\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 7. Check for security incidents\n    const incidents = detectSecurityIncidents();\n    if (incidents.length > 0) {\n      enhancedResult.securityIncidents = incidents.map((i) => i.type);\n      securityEvents.push({\n        type: \"security_incidents_detected\",\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n        severity: \"warning\",\n        message: `${incidents.length} security incidents detected`,\n        details: { incidents },\n      });\n    }\n\n    // 8. Structured audit logging\n    if (mergedConfig.enableAuditLogging) {\n      const outcome: AuditOutcome = enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification\n        ? \"partial\"\n        : \"success\";\n      const severity: AuditSeverity =\n        enhancedResult.securityIncidents && enhancedResult.securityIncidents.length > 0\n          ? \"warning\"\n          : \"info\";\n\n      logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n        category: \"authentication\",\n        severity,\n        outcome,\n        action: \"enhanced_auth\",\n        details: {\n          riskScore: enhancedResult.riskAssessment?.riskScore,\n          compromiseDetected: enhancedResult.compromiseDetection?.compromised,\n          sessionConflicts: enhancedResult.sessionConflict?.terminatedSessions.length,\n          requiresVerification: enhancedResult.requiresAdditionalVerification,\n          securityEvents,\n        },\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Attach enhanced result to context\n    c.set(\"enhancedAuth\", enhancedResult);\n\n    const duration = Date.now() - startTime;\n    logger.debug(\"Enhanced authentication completed\", {\n      keyId: auth.keyId,\n      duration,\n      securityEvents: securityEvents.length,\n      riskScore: enhancedResult.riskAssessment?.riskScore,\n    });\n\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n\n/**\n * Require specific permissions with enhanced checking.\n *\n * Checks permissions using dynamic RBAC cache and logs results.\n *\n * @param permissions - Array of permissions to check\n * @param options - Check options\n * @returns Hono middleware handler\n */\nexport function requirePermissions(\n  permissions: string[],\n  options: {\n    /** Require all permissions (true) or any permission (false) */\n    requireAll?: boolean;\n    /** Resource ID for resource-specific permissions */\n    resourceId?: string;\n    /** Enhanced auth config */\n    config?: EnhancedAuthConfig;\n  } = {}\n): MiddlewareHandler {\n  const { requireAll = true, resourceId, config } = options;\n\n  return async (c, next) => {\n    const auth = getAuthContext(c);\n    if (!auth) {\n      throw new HTTPException(401, { message: \"Authentication required\" });\n    }\n\n    const mergedConfig = { ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...config };\n    const permissionResults = new Map<string, PermissionCheckResult>();\n\n    // Check permissions\n    for (const permission of permissions) {\n      const result = checkPermission(auth.role || \"guest\", permission as any, {\n        resourceId,\n        userId: auth.keyId,\n        config: mergedConfig.sessionConfig,\n      });\n      permissionResults.set(permission, result);\n    }\n\n    // Determine if access is granted\n    let granted: boolean;\n    if (requireAll) {\n      granted = Array.from(permissionResults.values()).every((r) => r.granted);\n    } else {\n      granted = Array.from(permissionResults.values()).some((r) => r.granted);\n    }\n\n    if (!granted) {\n      // Log authorization failure\n      const deniedPermissions = Array.from(permissionResults.entries())\n        .filter(([, r]) => !r.granted)\n        .map(([p, r]) => `${p}: ${r.reason}`);\n\n      securityLogger.logAuthzFailure(c, \"permission\", \"enhanced\");\n\n      if (mergedConfig.enableAuditLogging) {\n        logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n          category: \"authorization\",\n          severity: \"warning\",\n          outcome: \"failure\",\n          action: \"permission_check\",\n          details: {\n            permissions,\n            requireAll,\n            deniedPermissions,\n          },\n        });\n      }\n\n      throw new HTTPException(403, {\n        message: \"Insufficient permissions\",\n      });\n    }\n\n    // Attach permission results to context\n    const enhancedResult = c.get(\"enhancedAuth\") as EnhancedAuthResult | undefined;\n    if (enhancedResult) {\n      enhancedResult.permissionResults = permissionResults;\n    }\n\n    // Log authorization success\n    if (mergedConfig.enableAuditLogging) {\n      logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n        category: \"authorization\",\n        severity: \"info\",\n        outcome: \"success\",\n        action: \"permission_check\",\n        details: {\n          permissions,\n          requireAll,\n        },\n      });\n    }\n\n    return next();\n  };\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Helper Functions\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Extract JWT token from request.\n */\nfunction extractJwtFromRequest(c: Context): string | null {\n  const authHeader = c.req.header(\"Authorization\");\n  if (authHeader?.startsWith(\"Bearer \")) {\n    return authHeader.substring(7);\n  }\n\n  const cookieHeader = c.req.header(\"Cookie\");\n  if (cookieHeader) {\n    const cookies = cookieHeader.split(\";\").map((c) => c.trim());\n    for (const cookie of cookies) {\n      if (cookie.startsWith(\"jwt=\") || cookie.startsWith(\"token=\")) {\n        return cookie.substring(4);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return null;\n}\n\n/**\n * Generate device fingerprint from user agent.\n */\nfunction deviceFingerprintFromUa(userAgent: string | undefined): string {\n  if (!userAgent) return \"unknown\";\n\n  // Simple hash of user agent for device identification\n  let hash = 0;\n  for (let i = 0; i < userAgent.length; i++) {\n    const char = userAgent.charCodeAt(i);\n    hash = (hash << 5) - hash + char;\n    hash = hash & hash;\n  }\n\n  return Math.abs(hash).toString(16);\n}\n\n/**\n * Get device type from user agent.\n */\nfunction getDeviceTypeFromUa(\n  userAgent: string | undefined\n): \"mobile\" | \"tablet\" | \"desktop\" | \"unknown\" {\n  if (!userAgent) return \"unknown\";\n\n  const ua = userAgent.toLowerCase();\n\n  if (/mobile|android|iphone|ipod|blackberry|iemobile|opera mini/i.test(ua)) {\n    return \"mobile\";\n  } else if (/tablet|ipad|playbook|silk/i.test(ua)) {\n    return \"tablet\";\n  } else if (ua.length > 0) {\n    return \"desktop\";\n  }\n\n  return \"unknown\";\n}\n\n/**\n * Log security event to audit log.\n */\nasync function logSecurityEvent(\n  c: Context,\n  auth: AuthContext,\n  eventType: string,\n  severity: \"info\" | \"warning\" | \"error\" | \"critical\"\n): Promise<void> {\n  logAuditEventFromContext(c, {\n    category: \"security\",\n    severity,\n    outcome: severity === \"error\" || severity === \"critical\" ? \"failure\" : \"success\",\n    action: eventType,\n    details: {\n      keyId: auth.keyId,\n      sessionId: auth.sessionId,\n      scope: auth.scope,\n      role: auth.role,\n    },\n  });\n}\n\n/**\n * Get enhanced auth result from context.\n */\nexport function getEnhancedAuth(c: Context): EnhancedAuthResult | undefined {\n  return c.get(\"enhancedAuth\");\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if additional verification is required.\n */\nexport function requiresAdditionalVerification(c: Context): boolean {\n  const enhancedAuth = getEnhancedAuth(c);\n  return enhancedAuth?.requiresAdditionalVerification ?? false;\n}\n\n/**\n * Get security incidents for current request.\n */\nexport function getSecurityIncidents(c: Context): string[] {\n  const enhancedAuth = getEnhancedAuth(c);\n  return enhancedAuth?.securityIncidents || [];\n}\n\n// ============================================================================\n// Utility Functions\n// ============================================================================\n\n/**\n * Invalidate all cached data for a user.\n * Call this when permissions, roles, or sessions change.\n *\n * @param keyId - API key ID\n */\nexport function invalidateUserAuthData(keyId: string): void {\n  invalidateUserCache(keyId);\n  logger.info(\"User auth data invalidated\", { keyId });\n}\n\n/**\n * Get comprehensive security status for a user.\n *\n * @param keyId - API key ID\n * @returns password that is too short\", async () => {\n675\t      const result = await validatePassword(\"Short1!\");\n676\t\n677\t      expect(result.valid).toBe(false);\n678\t      expect(result.errors).toContain(\"Password must be at least 12 characters long\");\n679\t    });\n680\t\n681\t    it(\"should reject password without uppercase\", async () => {\n682\t      const expect(result.valid).toBe(false);\n692\t      expect(result.errors).toContain(\"Password must contain at least one lowercase letter\");\n693\t    });\n694\t\n695\t    it(\"should reject password expect(result.errors).toContain(\"Password must contain at least one number\");\n700\t    });\n701\t\n702\t    it(\"should reject password without special characters\", async () => {\n703\t      const character\");\n707\t    });\n708\t\n709\t    it(\"should reject common weak passwords\", async () => {\n710\t      const result = await validatePassword(\"password123\");\n711\t\n712\t      expect(result.valid).toBe(false);\n713\t      expect(result.errors).toContain(\"Password is too common or weak\");\n714\t    });\n715\t\n716\t    it(\"should reject password with excessive repetition\", async () => {\n717\t      const result = await validatePassword(\"AAAAaaa111!!!\");\n718\t\n719\t      expect(result.valid).toBe(false);\n720\t      expect(result.errors.some((e) => e.includes(\"same character more than\"))).toBe(true);\n721\t    });\n722\t\n723\t    it(\"should calculate password strength correctly\", async () => {\n724\t      const weakPassword = await validatePassword(\"weak1!\");\n725\t      const strongPassword = await validatePassword(\"VeryStr0ng!Passw0rd@2024\");\n726\t\n727\t      expect(weakPassword.strength).toBeLessThan(strongPassword.strength);\n728\t      // The strength algorithm calculates 90 for this password based on:\n729\t      // - Length: 40 points (capped)\n730\t      // - Character variety: 25 points (lowercase + uppercase + numbers + special)\n731\t      // - Distribution: ~16 points (18 unique chars / 23 total)\n732\t      // - Complexity bonus: 10 points\n733\t      // Total: ~91 points, capped at 90\n734\t      expect(strongPassword.strength).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(90);\n735\t    });\n736\t  });\n737\t\n738\t  describe(\"session security features\", () => {\n739\t    it(\"should enforce concurrent session limit\", async () => {\n740\t      // Create maximum concurrent sessions\n741\t      const sessions: string[] = [];\n742\t      for      // The oldest session should be deactivated\n748\t      const activeSessions = getActiveSessionsForApiKey(\"test_key_123\");\n749\t      expect(activeSessions.length).toBeLessThanOrEqual(5); // Max concurrent sessions\n750\t    });\n751\t\n752\t    it(\"should enforce IP binding for sessions\", async () => {\n753\t      // Reset tracking to avoid rate limiting from previous tests\n754\t \"192.168.100.50\",\n760\t        \"test-agent\",\n761\t        undefined,\n762\t        {\n763\t          ipBinding: true,\n764\t        }\n765\t      );\n766\t\n767\t      // Create app with session describe(\"account lockout protection\", () => {\n797\t    it(\"should track failed authentication attempts\", async () => {\n798\t      const testApp = new Hono();\n799\t      testApp.use(\"*\", {\n804\t        await testApp.request(\"/test\", {\n805\t          headers: {\n806\t            Authorization: \"Bearer test_key_123:wrong_secret\",\n807\t          },\n808\t        });\n809\t      }\n810\t\n811\t      // The API key should have failed attempts recorded\n812\t      // Note: This is testing the lockout mechanism is in place\n813\t      // In a real scenario, after 5 failed {\n819\t      // Reset tracking to avoid rate limiting from previous tests\n820\t      resetSuspiciousActivityTracking();\n821\t      resetAuthFailureTracking();\n822\t\n823\t      const { sessionId } = await createSession(\"test_key_123\", \"127.0.0.1\", \"test-agent\");\n824\t\n825\t      // Get the session and manually set it as expired\n826\t      const testApp = new Hono();\n827\t      testApp.use(\"*\", apiKeyAuth({ allowSessions: true }));\n828\t      testApp.get(\"/test\", (c) => c.json({ ok: true }));\n829\t\n830\t      // Access should work initially (include IP header to match Date.now() - 1000;\n844\t      }\n845\t\n846\t      // Access should fail after expiration\n847\t      const res2 = await testApp.request(\"/test\", {\n848\t        headers: {\n849\t          Authorization: `Bearer ${sessionId}`,\n850\t          \"X-Forwarded-For\": \"127.0.0.1\",\n851\t        },\n852\t      });\n853\t      expect(res2.status).toBe(401);\n854\t    });\n855\t\n856\t    it(\"should handle session idle timeout\", async () => {\n857\t      // Reset tracking to avoid rate limiting from previous tests\n858\t      resetSuspiciousActivityTracking();\n859\t      resetAuthFailureTracking();\n860\t\n861\t      const { sessionId } = await createSession(\"test_key_123\", \"127.0.0.1\", \"test-agent\");\n862\t\n863\t      // Get the session and simulate idle // Set lastActivity to more than 30 minutes ago\n868\t        (session as any).lastActivityAt = Date.now() - 31 * 60 * 1000;\n869\t      }\n870\t\n871\t      // Create app with session auth\n872\t      const testApp = new Hono();\n873\t      testApp.use(\"*\", apiKeyAuth({ allowSessions: true }));\n874\t      testApp.get(\"/test\", (c) => c.json({ ok: true }));\n875\t\n876\t      // Access should \"127.0.0.1\",\n881\t        },\n882\t      });\n883\t      expect(res.status).toBe(401);\n884\t    });\n885\t\n886\t    it(\"should clean up expired sessions\", async () => {\n887\t      // Create \"127.0.0.1\",\n910\t        \"test-agent\",\n911\t        undefined,\n912\t        {\n913\t          createRefreshToken: true,\n914\t        }\n915\t      );\n916\t\n917\t      // Manually expire the {\n927\t    it(\"should detect when session needs refresh\", async () => {\n928\t      const { sessionId } = await createSession(\"test_key_123\", \"127.0.0.1\", \"test-agent\");\n929\t\n930\t      // Fresh session shouldn't need refresh\n931\t      expect(shouldRefreshSession(sessionId)).toBe(false);\n932\t\n933\t      // Manually set session to near expiration\n934\t      const sessions = now (within sliding window)\n938\t        (session as any).expiresAt = Date.now() + 14 * 60 * 1000;\n939\t      }\n940\t\n941\t      // Session should now need refresh\n942\t      expect(shouldRefreshSession(sessionId)).toBe(true);\n943\t    });\n944\t\n945\t    it(\"should extend session expiration on refresh\", async () => {\n946\t      const { sessionId, refreshToken } = sessions.find((s) => s.sessionId === sessionId);\n959\t      const originalExpiresAt = oldSession?.expiresAt || 0;\n960\t\n961\t      // Wait a small amount to ensure time difference\n962\t      await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 10));\n963\t\n964\t      // Refresh the session\n965\t      const result = await refreshSession(refreshToken!, \"127.0.0.1\");\n966\t\n967\t      expect(result).not.toBeNull();\n968\t\n969\t      // Get new session expiration\n970\t      const newSessions = getActiveSessionsForApiKey(\"test_key_123\");\n971\t      const newSession = newSessions.find((s) => s.sessionId === result!.sessionId);\n972\t      const newExpiresAt = newSession?.expiresAt || 0;\n973\t\n974\t      // New expiration should be later than original\n975\t      expect(newExpiresAt).toBeGreaterThan(originalExpiresAt);\n976\t    });\n977\t\n978\t    it(\"should rotate refresh tokens on use\", async () => {\n979\t      // Reset tracking to avoid rate limiting from previous tests\n980\t      resetSuspiciousActivityTracking();\n981\t      resetAuthFailureTracking();\n982\t\n983\t      const { refreshToken } = await createSession(\n984\t        \"test_key_123\",\n985\t        \"127.0.0.1\",\n986\t        \"test-agent\",\n987\t        undefined,\n988\t        {\n989\t          createRefreshToken: true,\n990\t        }\n991\t      );\n992\t\n993\t      // First refresh should work\n994\t      const result1 = await refreshSession(refreshToken!, \"127.0.0.1\");\n995\t      expect(result1).not.toBeNull();\n996\t\n997\t      // Old refresh token should not work again (single use)\n998\t      const result2 = await refreshSession(refreshToken!, \"127.0.0.1\");\n999\t      expect(result2).toBeNull();\n1000\t\n1001\t      // IMPORTANT: When token reuse is detected, the entire rotation family is invalidated\n1002\t      // This is a security feature to prevent token theft attacks\n1003\t      // Therefore, the new refresh token is also invalidated\n1004\t      const result3 = await refreshSession(result1!.newRefreshToken, \"127.0.0.1\");\n1005\t      expect(result3).toBeNull(); // New token is also invalidated due to token reuse\n1006\t    });\n1007\t  });\n1008\t\n1009\t  describe(\"concurrent session limit edge cases\", () => {\n1010\t    it(\"should enforce exact concurrent session limit\", async () => {\n1011\t      // Clear existing sessions for test_key_123\n1012\t      invalidateAllSessionsForKey(\"test_key_123\");\n1013\t\n1014\t      // Create exactly 5 concurrent sessions\n1015\t      const );\n1170\t\n1171\t      const testApp = new Hono();\n1172\t      testApp.use(\"*\", apiKeyAuth({ allowSessions: true }));\n1173\t      testApp.get(\"/test\", (c) => c.json({ ok: true => {\n1189\t      const metadata = {\n1190\t        userId: \"user123\",\n1191\t        email: \"user@example.com\",\n1192\t        dangerous: \"<script>alert('xss')</script>\",\n1193\t        sqlInjection: \"' OR '1'='1\",\n1194\t        nested: {\n1195\t          value: \"safe value\",\n1196\t          dangerous: \"<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>\",\n1197\t        },\n1198\t      };\n1199\t\n1200\t      const { sessionId } = await createSession(\n1201\t        \"test_key_123\",\n1202\t        \"127.0.0.1\",\n1203\t        \"test-agent\",\n1204\t        metadata\n1205\t      );\n1206\t\n1207\t      const sessions = getActiveSessionsForApiKey(\"test_key_123\");\n1208\t      const session = sessions.find((s) => s.sessionId === sessionId);\n1209\t\n1210\t
